text: The city health department announced a free vaccination drive on Monday. Officials said 42 clinics will operate from 9 AM to 5 PM this week, and appointments can be booked through the official municipal website.
Doctors have confirmed that drinking hot salt water every hour instantly kills all viruses in the body and makes vaccines unnecessary, according to secret hospital reports.
India's meteorological department issued a rainfall alert for coastal districts, advising residents to avoid low-lying areas and follow district administration updates.
Scientists proved gravity is fake in a new study and announced that people can train themselves to float by breathing in a special rhythm for 10 minutes daily.
The Reserve Bank kept the policy rate unchanged in its latest review, citing inflation trends and global economic uncertainty.
A new law passed overnight says all students will receive full marks automatically if they forward a government message to 25 contacts before midnight.
According to an official Railway Ministry release, two additional festival special trains will run between Delhi and Patna next week to handle increased passenger demand.
Nutrition experts now say vegetables are harmful and that eating only packaged snacks for 30 days improves memory and immunity.
The district collector said road repair work on NH-27 will begin on Friday and may cause temporary diversions between 8 PM and 6 AM.
A viral claim says smartphones can detect lies with 100% accuracy by scanning voice vibrations, and police will soon replace investigations with mobile apps.
The state education board released exam results on its official portal and advised students to verify marks using their roll numbers.
Meteorologists announced that placing mirrors on rooftops can stop cyclones from entering cities.
The health ministry published updated guidelines for seasonal flu prevention, including hand hygiene and early consultation for symptoms.
A social media post claims that all banks will permanently close cash withdrawals next month without any official notification.
Municipal officials began a waste segregation awareness campaign in schools and residential areas this week.
Researchers discovered that charging your phone under moonlight doubles battery life instantly.
The transport department announced revised bus routes due to ongoing metro construction in central zones.
An online message claims that drinking only energy drinks can replace meals and cure vitamin deficiency.
Police authorities issued an advisory asking citizens to verify job offers and avoid sharing OTPs with unknown callers.
A viral video alleges that traffic signals are controlled by satellites from another planet to monitor private conversations.
